options.label: Male
options.snippet: a young man

options.label: Female
options.snippet: a young woman

options.label: Non-binary
options.snippet: someone who has never fit neatly into the village's old words

options.label: Child
options.snippet: small for the trial, and painfully aware of it

options.label: Youth
options.snippet: young enough that the elders still call you 'little one'

options.label: Young Adult
options.snippet: at the age most cultivators begin, neither too early nor too late

options.label: Middle-aged
options.snippet: older than most who stand at this gate, and you feel every year of it

options.label: Elder
options.snippet: gray-haired among disciples half your age, here anyway

options.label: Orphan
options.snippet: you have no family name to offer, only yourself

options.label: Merchant Family
options.snippet: your family's coin bought you the road here, if nothing else

options.label: Farming Family
options.snippet: your hands still remember the calluses of the family field

options.label: Fallen Noble House
options.snippet: your house's name once meant something, before it didn't

options.label: Wandering Performer
options.snippet: you learned to read a crowd before you learned to read words

options.label: Scholar's Household
options.snippet: you were raised on ink and old texts, not swords

options.label: Fire
options.snippet: warmth radiates faintly from your core, like a banked coal

options.label: Water
options.snippet: a cool stillness pools beneath your ribs

options.label: Wood
options.snippet: something in you grows quietly, patient as a root in soil

options.label: Metal
options.snippet: a faint, hard resonance hums beneath your skin like struck iron

options.label: Earth
options.snippet: a heavy, grounded weight settles behind your sternum

options.label: Heretical (multi-element)
options.snippet: too many elements answer you at once, tangled and unruly

options.label: Void (near-zero root)
options.snippet: almost nothing answers when you reach inward, an unsettling quiet

options.label: Destitute
options.snippet: you own nothing but the clothes on your back

options.label: Modest
options.snippet: you carry just enough coin to not worry about tonight

options.label: Comfortable
options.snippet: you have never gone hungry, and it shows

options.label: Wealthy
options.snippet: the silk at your collar marks you before you speak a word

options.label: Hidden Fortune
options.snippet: you carry more wealth than anyone here would guess to look at you

options.label: Righteous
options.snippet: you believe the Dao should be earned honestly, or not at all

options.label: Pragmatic
options.snippet: you believe results matter more than the path taken to them

options.label: Ruthless
options.snippet: you have already decided that mercy is a debt you cannot afford

options.label: Compassionate
options.snippet: you cannot help but notice the suffering of those around you

options.label: Detached
options.snippet: you watch the world's troubles the way one watches weather

options.label: Human
options.snippet: your blood is plain and human, for whatever that is worth here

options.label: Half-Spirit-Beast
options.snippet: something ancient and feral stirs faintly beneath your human shape

options.label: Demonic Bloodline
options.snippet: a bloodline the sects would call demonic runs quiet in your veins

options.label: Reincarnated Soul
options.snippet: fragments of a life not your own surface at the strangest moments

options.label: Remote Mountain Village
options.snippet: you grew up where the mountains kept the world at a distance

options.label: Bustling City
options.snippet: you grew up in noise and crowds, never silence

options.label: Sect Territory
options.snippet: you grew up in the shadow of cultivators, always looking up

options.label: Borderlands Near Wilds
options.snippet: you grew up close enough to the wilds to know their smell before a storm

options.label: Floating Trade Barge
options.snippet: you grew up with the world sliding past beneath a barge's deck

options.label: Loving Family
options.snippet: a family waits for your letters, worried and warm

options.label: Estranged Family
options.snippet: you left words unsaid to a family you may never see again

options.label: Sole Survivor
options.snippet: you are the only one left of the family you were born into

options.label: Large Clan Obligations
options.snippet: a sprawling clan's expectations ride on your shoulders here

options.label: Adoptive Family
options.snippet: the family that raised you shares none of your blood, and all of your loyalty

options.label: Auspicious Birth
options.snippet: you were born beneath signs the local diviner called auspicious

options.label: Cursed Birth
options.snippet: you were born beneath signs the local diviner refused to fully explain

options.label: Neutral
options.snippet: no omen marked your birth one way or the other

options.label: Twin-Star Omen
options.snippet: a diviner once told your family a rival or ally is fated to mirror your path

options.label: Unreadable Fate
options.snippet: every diviner who has tried to read your fate has simply gone quiet

options.label: Striking
options.snippet: people's eyes catch on you and linger a moment too long

options.label: Plain
options.snippet: you have the kind of face people forget within the hour

options.label: Unsettling
options.snippet: something about your bearing makes strangers take half a step back

options.label: Delicate
options.snippet: you look like something easily broken, whether or not that's true

options.label: Imposing
options.snippet: you take up more space in a room than your frame should allow

options.label: Slow but Steady
options.snippet: you have never learned anything quickly, but you have never unlearned it either

options.label: Prodigy
options.snippet: things that take others years have always come to you in weeks

options.label: Late Bloomer
options.snippet: you suspect your real talent hasn't shown itself yet

options.label: One-Trick Genius
options.snippet: you are astonishing at exactly one thing, and unremarkable at everything else

options.label: Balanced
options.snippet: you are competent at nearly everything, exceptional at nothing
